'''Deme Tryshyn''' was [[Grav-ball/Legends|Grav-ball's]] highest scorer in history. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], he signed the most lucrative product endorsement deal in sports history, with [[Ardees Beverage Company/Legends|Ardees Beverage Company]] for 3.1 billion [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] over three [[Standard year/Legends|standard years]]. Tryshyn also signed deals with [[Keenigh Footwear]], [[Herzfall Corporation/Legends|Herzfall Communications]], and [[Telgorn Corporation/Legends|Telgorn Power Cells]].

At the time, Tryshyn's agent denied any connection to his summons by the [[Republic Tax Collection Agency/Legends|Republic Tax Collection Agency]]. Tryshyn had no scores in the first three matches of that season.

==Appearances==
